name: receipts
description: Agents need receipts: a verification layer that re-proves an AI fix before you trust it. The Gates standard (G0-G13, applied in any medium) + a Claude Code adapter + a CI enforcer + verification memory.

plugins.name: receipts
plugins.description: The Gates (G0-G13) agent adapter: teaches your agent to carry a red->green receipt, fix the surface the reporter sees, sweep twins + dependents, build on a fresh base, stay compatible across the deploy window, and never game the referee - applied in any medium (web / API / library / CLI / data / ...) - plus a Stop-hook verification backstop and verification memory.
